data.body:
TIER C COMPLETE & RETIRED (2026-06-12).
Full §2 lifecycle done for all three compute commands:
- list-epics: deprecated (worm-burr-fly).
- next-batch: ported (sure-beech-taunt) -> flipped -> soaked -> retired.
- validate: ported (gawk-grove-site) -> flipped -> soaked -> retired (785b-7c9f).
Retirement commit 3567a2ff deleted both bash scripts + REBAR_COMPUTE + _compute_python + dual-impl wiring (~1,899 LOC). Python is the sole impl. Closing this story — Tier C is done. Next: Tier D (write/sync core, the crux), which folds in bug stiff-mop-lane.
